Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: Represents an administrator user in the CampusConnect application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Admin entity.

photoURL.description: URL of the administrator's profile picture.

Teacher.title: Teacher
Teacher.description: Represents a teacher user in the CampusConnect application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Teacher entity.

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth of the teacher.

photoURL.description: URL of the teacher's profile picture.

disabled.description: If true, the user account is disabled.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student user in the CampusConnect application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth of the student.

photoURL.description: URL of the student's profile picture.

disabled.description: If true, the user account is disabled.

Timetable.title: Timetable
Timetable.description: Represents a timetable for a specific day.

id.description: Unique ID, usually in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

date.description: The date for this timetable in YYYY-MM-DD format.

createdBy.description: The UID of the admin who created/updated this timetable.

TimetableEntry.title: TimetableEntry
TimetableEntry.description: Represents a single lecture cell within a timetable.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TimetableEntry entity.

class.description: The class for which the entry is applicable.

teacherName.description: The name of the teacher assigned to this lecture.

timeSlot.description: The time slot for the lecture (e.g., '07:40').

date.description: The date of the lecture in YYYY-MM-DD format.

room.description: Optional room number for the lecture.

teacherId.description: Optional UID of the teacher, if mapped.

AttendanceRecord.title: AttendanceRecord
AttendanceRecord.description: Represents a student's attendance record for a specific lecture.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AttendanceRecord entity.

teacherId.description: Reference to the Teacher who took the attendance.

classId.description: The class of the student at the time of the record.

date.description: The date of the lecture in YYYY-MM-DD format.

timeSlot.description: The time slot of the lecture.

/timetables/{timetableId}.description: Stores timetable container documents for a specific day.

/attendanceRecords/{attendanceRecordId}.description: Stores attendance records for each student and lecture.
